metadata.name: Commander Damage from a Copy does NOT count (CC #26)
metadata.description: Corner case #26: A copy of an opponent's commander deals combat damage to you. The damage is normal combat damage, NOT commander damage. CR 707.2: copies don't copy external designations — a clone of a commander is not itself a commander. The engine tracks commander damage by CardId membership in commander_ids. A copy has a different CardId (or none matching) so it never increments commander_damage_received. This script is informational (draft) because the replay harness does not yet support DeclareAttackers / DeclareBlockers commands; the behavior is unit-tested in crates/engine/tests/commander_damage.rs::test_commander_damage_from_copy_does_not_count.
metadata.generation_notes: Marked draft because the replay harness does not support DeclareAttackers/DeclareBlockers. The corresponding unit test is test_commander_damage_from_copy_does_not_count in commander_damage.rs (Session 4). When the harness gains combat support, this script should be upgraded to approved and verified end-to-end.

script.step_note: INFORMATIONAL: p2 would attack p1 with a copy of p1's commander (represented here as Grizzly Bears with no CardId in commander_ids). Combat damage would not count as commander damage.

actions.description: Initial state: p1 at 40 life, commander on battlefield; Grizzly Bears (non-commander copy) on p2's side
actions.note: CR 707.2: A copy of Llanowar Elves does not inherit the commander designation. Engine: CardId of copy not in commander_ids.

actions.description: INFORMATIONAL: p2 attacks with Grizzly Bears (clone-of-commander stand-in). Grizzly Bears deals 2 combat damage to p1. This is normal damage, not commander damage.
actions.note: The harness does not execute DeclareAttackers. This step is documentation only. Unit test: test_commander_damage_from_copy_does_not_count in commander_damage.rs.
CR 903.10: commander_damage_received NOT incremented for p1 because Grizzly Bears' CardId is not in any commander_ids. No commander damage SBA fires even if 21 such attacks happened.
